name: Nexera Energy Inc.
summary: Nexera Energy Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of petroleum and natural gas properties in Alberta, Canada; and Southwest Texas, the United States. It owns and operates Lavernia, Wooden Horse, and Nash Creek Projects, as well as owns working interests in the HugoCellR, Cotulla, and MarPat partnerships. The company was formerly known as Emerald Bay Energy Inc. and changed its name to Nexera Energy Inc. in March 2020. Nexera Energy Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
